target_repository.merge_strategy: audited pull request; no destructive overwrite of source repositories

source_repositories.synthesis_role: legacy/mobile agent operating base; import only through explicit audited paths
terminal-shell reference; import only non-secret implementation artifacts
Apple/Xcode reference; import only portable source/config/data artifacts

non_destructive_constraints: Do not delete, force-push, archive, or overwrite source repositories as part of synthesis.
Do not copy secrets, local .env files, key material, tokens, private certificates, or runtime logs into the target repository.
Every import must create an auditable manifest entry before code/data is copied.
Conflicting files must be staged under integration/source/<repo-slug>/ until a maintainer-approved replacement decision exists.

rest_order_cleanup.cleanup_decision: PRs 3 and 4 were closed as stale/superseded after PR 7 landed; no open PR rest orders remain in the target repository.
